name: Marketing Cloud Release Notes – 13 Nov 2025
body: [{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"OVERVIEW"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"In this release, we have unveiled an improvement to how admins can manage and grant control to permanent or contractual staff members in Marketing Cloud."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"USERS & PERMISSIONS ENHANCEMENT"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To empower administrators with greater control over account management rights, we have now introduced the "},{"text":"Activate","bold":true},{"text":"/"},{"text":"Deactivate","bold":true},{"text":" options when managing user (agent) accounts. Admins can access these options by visiting the Users and Permissions feature."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/1WB6RNI3AH3I/activate1.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/1WB6RNI3AH3I/activate1.png","name":"activate1.png","type":"image/png","size":258937,"width":2880,"height":986,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2F1WB6RNI3AH3I%2Factivate1.png","active":true,"mediaID":1427,"dateInserted":"2025-11-13T08:26:01+00:00","insertUserID":2012,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"2012","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"It can be used in scenarios where a company has employed agents on a contract or temporary basis and needs to provide account access for a brief period. Admins can temporarily disable an employee's application access using the "},{"text":"Deactivate","bold":true},{"text":" option when the employee is on probation, on leave, or being reassigned to a different role. "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Once agents have been given new roles or made permanent members, their access must be granted again. To achieve this, admins can simply click on "},{"text":"Activate","bold":true},{"text":" next to the staff member’s name, then reallocate the permissions accordingly."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/0CPW48DMUU7U/per14.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/0CPW48DMUU7U/per14.png","name":"per14.png","type":"image/png","size":103664,"width":2880,"height":387,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2F0CPW48DMUU7U%2Fper14.png","active":true,"mediaID":1426,"dateInserted":"2025-11-13T08:25:33+00:00","insertUserID":2012,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"2012","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To understand more about the list of privileges given to an account user and how to oversee them, read our "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/47-managing-users-and-permissions-in-marketing-cloud","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Managing Users and Permissions in Marketing Cloud","bold":true}]},{"text":" article."}]}]
